observations: role=heading level=3 name='To Do' is visible with a count badge of '1'
role=heading level=3 name='In Progress' is visible with count '0'
role=heading level=3 name='Done' is visible with count '0'
Exactly one card exists under the To Do column: a link with href='/browse/AUT-1'
The AUT-1 card link has accessible name 'AUT-1 Design autonomous replanning loop. Use the enter key to load the work item.'
The AUT-1 card renders the summary text 'Design autonomous replanning loop' (NOT 'This is a test' as specified in expect_fields)
The AUT-1 card renders an img with alt='Task' (the type/key icon)
The AUT-1 card renders the visible text 'AUT-1' next to the Task icon
A button with aria-label='Priority: High' is present on the AUT-1 card (NOT 'Medium' as specified in expect_fields notes)
An img inside the priority button carries alt='Priority: High'
A button with aria-label='Assignee: None' is present on the AUT-1 card (generic/unassigned avatar)
The card's summary 'Edit summary' button has accessible name 'Edit summary'
Card actions menu button has aria-label 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the To Do column'
No green check-mark icon is present on AUT-1 since its status is 'To Do', not 'Done'

locators.purpose: AUT-1 card link (entire card, by key+summary)
locators.preferred: getByRole('link', { name: /AUT-1 Design autonomous replanning loop/ })
getByText('Design autonomous replanning loop', { exact: true })

locators.purpose: Assignee avatar button on AUT-1 card (None)
Done column heading (used to verify green-check behavior if card moved)

interactions: await expect(page.getByRole('link', { name: /AUT-1 Design autonomous replanning loop/ })).toBeVisible()

notes: Feature structure is observable (summary text, key+icon badge, priority icon, assignee avatar all render on the AUT-1 card). However, two expected values in the spec are WRONG for this environment: (1) summary is 'Design autonomous replanning loop', not 'This is a test'; (2) priority is 'High', not the default 'Medium'. Specs should either assert the actual values above or assert presence/shape (role=button with aria-label matching /^Priority:/, summary text non-empty) rather than exact literals. The 'green check next to AUT-1 when status=Done' claim was not directly observed this session because AUT-1 sits in the To Do column — do not encode that sub-assertion without first moving the card.
